authorities.name: California Department of Fish and Wildlife

sources.title: CCR T14 §7.50(b)(91) — McGee Creek (Mono Co.)
sources.quotedText: (91) McGee Creek (Mono Co.). McGee Creek downstream from Highway 395. Sat. preceding Memorial Day through Sep. 30. 5 trout

sources.title: USGS GNIS (The National Map Gazetteer) — Streams layer record for gaz_id 263352, "McGee Creek", Stream, Mono Co., CA
sources.quotedText: {"gaz_id":263352,"gaz_name":"McGee Creek","gaz_featureclass":"Stream","fcode":46000,"state_alpha":"CA","county_name":"Mono","objectid_1":1404018}; geometry multipoint, first point (Web Mercator -13222915.9094, 4523961.3074) converts to lon -118.783475, lat 37.606327, near this creek's mouth at Crowley Lake just downstream of Highway 395 (consistent with the CCR reach description 'McGee Creek downstream from Highway 395'; a second GNIS record, gaz_id 263353, matches the same name but sits ~35 km north near lat 37.8-37.9 and is a different, unrelated stream). Corrects prior file coordinates (-118.7780, 37.5870), which were off by ~2.2 km from this GNIS-recorded point.

sources.title: McGee Creek | Hiking & Camping | Visit Mono County
California Fish and Game Code §7145 — Sport Fishing License Requirement
sources.quotedText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...

sources.title: 2026 Provisional Stocking Document for Trout and Inland Salmon — CDFW
sources.quotedText: R6 Mono McGee Creek Rainbow Trout Catchable Put and Take April-November

regulations.humanSummary: Open Saturday preceding Memorial Day through September 30 on McGee Creek downstream from Highway 395
regulations.verbatimText: McGee Creek downstream from Highway 395. Sat. preceding Memorial Day through Sep. 30.

parameters.counting_rule: Special daily bag limit of 5 trout on McGee Creek downstream from Highway 395, in place of the statewide default trout limit; possession limit is twice the daily bag per statewide general trout regulations (14 CCR §5.85).

parameters.note: McGee Creek downstream from Highway 395 is closed to fishing outside the Saturday-preceding-Memorial-Day through September 30 season.

regulations.humanSummary: Closed outside the designated season (Sat. before Memorial Day through Sep. 30)
regulations.verbatimText: Sat. preceding Memorial Day through Sep. 30.

parameters.note: Anglers 16 years of age or older must have a valid California sport fishing license.

regulations.humanSummary: California sport fishing license required for anglers 16+
regulations.verbatimText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...

stockingSchedule.note: CDFW's 2026 Provisional Stocking Document lists McGee Creek (Mono Co.) as a Put and Take water stocked with catchable-size rainbow trout during the release month range April through November.
